description: Composition Yellow and indigo striped polo neck T-shirt with blue and black accents, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with ribbed hems, ribbed collar with a buttoned chest placket, embroidered branding, and a vented hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron No bleaching No dry cleaning Nothing exudes class and elegance as much as a Levi's polo neck T-shirt. Wear this exuberant piece to any off-duty event to look your stylish best. Pair this tee with a classic denims and suede shoes to snazz up your style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
